elements.title: Mã Pí Lèng Pass
elements.contents: ... that it took nearly two years to cut into a cliff to complete a road across Mã Pí Lèng Pass (pictured) in Vietnam?

elements.title: Bernhard Waldenfels
elements.contents: ... that Bernhard Waldenfels discussed "black holes of everyday life" in a book subtitled Challenges of Phenomenology?

elements.title: Night King
elements.contents: ... that the actresses in Night King visited a nightclub and spoke with mama-sans to prepare for their roles?

elements.title: Daniel van der Meulen
elements.contents: ... that Daniel van der Meulen was dispatched to Saudi Arabia to urge Arab nations not to ally with Nazi Germany?

elements.title: Prison Mathematics Project
elements.contents: ... that the Prison Mathematics Project brought a professor from Italy to an American prison to celebrate Pi Day?

elements.title: Harry Akin
elements.contents: ... that John F. Kennedy asked fast-food entrepreneur Harry Akin to lead the desegregation of United States restaurants?

elements.title: The Massacre
elements.contents: ... that the rewrites to The Massacre were so extensive that the original writer briefly asked for his name to be removed?

elements.title: Czech Republic men's team
elements.contents: ... that, at the first five Ball Hockey World Championships, the Czech Republic men's team reached four finals?

elements.title: Xalavier Nelson Jr.
elements.contents: ... that Xalavier Nelson Jr. developed games with "eye-catching" titles such as Space Warlord Organ Trading Simulator and An Airport for Aliens Currently Run by Dogs?
